feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2930
entry.content: >Ass, Gas, or Cash - Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83822600 >Scripts to check image metadata:

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Sony won
entry.content: >Only 15% of PS5 game sales are physical >Sony expects only 2-3% of people to not move over to fully buying digital >The retailer cut is around 20-30% >Sony now makes 17-28% more money by doing nothing Admit it. If you were a businessman you would be a complete retard to do not do this

entry.title: /mu/ Music: was venom the first thrash/black metal band?
entry.content: i think it may be true. first album was 1981 predating a lot of others that seemed to be following their lead. dumb as their music was it seems to still hold up even to todays standards of that genre.

entry.title: /int/ International: DJT - Daily Japanese Thread #3818
entry.content: DJT is a language learning thread for those studying the Japanese language. Japanese speakers learning English are welcome, too. Read the guide linked below before asking how to learn Japanese: https://web.archive.org/web/2022032 6112058/https://itazuraneko.neociti es.org/learn/guide.html Grammar references: https://djtguide.github.io/grammar/ grammarmain.html Archive of older threads: https://desuarchive.org/int/search/ subject/Daily%20Japanese%20Thread/ Translation requests, insults, politics,

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The difference between an album you love and an album you hate is often one or t…
entry.content: The difference between an album you love and an album you hate is often one or two cuts. An inspired song that fulfills a fantasy you never knew you had can make you believe in a whole side, while a song that commits some deadly sin can drag innocents to perdition. In "Music," for example, Cat tells us there wouldn't be any "wars in the world/If everybody joined in the band." This kind of lie is called a tautology; it's like saying there wouldn't be any hunger if everyone became an ice cream man

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: [Sad News] ‘Werwulf’ will not include a creature transformation

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Why are people surprised that they don't actually own digital content? Shitty co…
entry.content: Why are people surprised that they don't actually own digital content? Shitty corporate practices aside, there was never any precedent for digital ownership. A license is simply permission to access the content. It was pretty clear in the terms of service you agreed to (goyim). StopKillingGames is gay. You only own content if it's open source or you own a physical copy. You chose convenience over freedom.

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Why Do the Chinese Like Music So Much?
entry.content: Exactly why do the Chinese dedicate more of their curriculum to music education that inspire future generations to become musicians than do Westerners?

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Hello World!
entry.content: It's been another privileged day in the EU! I know the world envies us and I am not here to gloat. I have been fully on board with the Arduous June–July and I hope we will save the Earth. I simply wanted to connect with the people of the globe to ask what they are eating today! I am eating my favorite food: a tortilla with bugs to reduce my CO2 footprint! I hope everyone has food to eat like we do in Europe. I donate to charities that which isn't taxed. They need to tax more. :)

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Evidenence of GNU+Shitux cancer
entry.content: sourceware.org/pipermail/libc-alpha /2026-July/178490.html This right here, picrel is why Linux is a joke. Look at these retards breaking things because MUST UPDOOT AND BREAK SHIT THAT PEOPLE RELY ON THE REAL WORLD. When you're building a platform or a foundation you don't constantly change and break the very foundation that people use to build everything else on, if you made early decisions that came out to be wrong or bad, too bad. You leave it you don't change it. millions of software project

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: Wifwolf Monthly
entry.content: Not the Anon who usually makes these threads, but let's give it a try anyway. It's the tail end of the full moon period of the Strawberry Moon. Still, just enough time to get a wifwolf thread going. Hope you and your wifwolf have been able to handle the sweltering heat of these past few weeks well, or are going to, depending on where you are. And as the usual Anon would say: As usual arts and stories are appreciated. Until next time, ~Anon ===== Previously on /wifwolf/: Cobalt_Blue_Sphere >Despe

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: The best part about making meatballs is knowing that /v/ doesn’t know how to. An…
entry.content: The best part about making meatballs is knowing that /v/ doesn’t know how to. And it is important to make meatballs so that you can remind /v/ that they aren’t allowed to have anything good in life. They’re allowed to have console wars and demoralization threads, and GTA6 spam. And, you know, that’s pretty much it

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Switch Lite.
entry.content: Curious to hear from anyone who picked one of these up, I'm aware of the drift issue but I can always send it to Nintendo for repairs if need be. I've recently had a lot of hospital appointments and I'd like to get one of these as a cheap inconsequential means of playing games while waiting so I'm curious how the experience is and any game recommendations that are well suited for it.

entry.title: /news/ News: US job drops sharply in June; labor force participation rate 5-year low
entry.content: https://www.reuters.com/world/us/us -job-growth-misses-expectations-jun e-unemployment-rate-falls-42-2026-0 7-02/ U.S. job growth slowed sharply in June and payroll gains for the prior two months were revised lower, pointing to a cooling labor market and prompting financial markets to dial back expectations for a near-term interest rate hike from the Federal Reserve. While the Labor Department's closely watched employment report on Thursday showed the unemployment rate dropped to 4.2% last month

entry.title: /int/ International: In my mid-sized city, the most exciting that has happened in the past 3 years is…
entry.content: In my mid-sized city, the most exciting that has happened in the past 3 years is a Uniqlo location opening. Before that, it was Costco opening a gas station and a T&T Supermarket opening that were the most exciting things ever to happen. Is it like this in your country too?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: I never watch anything made before 2010. What am I missing out on?
entry.content: I never watch anything made before 2010. What am I missing out on?

entry.title: /b/ Random: Bill and Hillary Clinton recline in rocking chairs separated (purposefully) by a…
entry.content: Bill and Hillary Clinton recline in rocking chairs separated (purposefully) by a little wicker coffee table on the front porch of a secret Virginia property, watching angry black clouds approaching from the east. "You know what I love?" Bill asks in his endearingly bumbling southern drawl. "Moments like this," he answers without a response. "Storm coming in, but we're alright. Get to watch it with my old lady who's seen me through thick and thin," he wheezes. Hillary smiles emptily. "You know wh

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: New trailer for action thriller MOTOR CITY starring Alan Ritchson
entry.content: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=t6R klhKu9os >In 1970s Detroit, mechanic John Miller (Alan Ritchson) falls in love with Sophia (Shailene Woodley), the ex-girlfriend of ruthless mobster Reynolds (Ben Foster), who frames him for a crime he did not commit. After six years in prison, Miller breaks out with the help of his old army companions and embarks on a brutal campaign of vengeance to reclaim his life. The gimmick is that the movie is mostly dialogue-free, with only five lines of dialogue throu

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: BLAME THE SUITS
entry.content: The American model of game development is crumbling. >spend 8 years making absolute dogshit that gets a 63 on metacritic >work maybe an hour a day >when the publisher steps in to question why the fuck you haven’t done anything, cry about crunch and an abusive work environment Okay fine, clearly this isn’t working. You can’t do your job so we’re cutting you loose. >NOOOOO YOU CANT DO THAT ITS YOUR FAULT THAT WE FAILED! OUR 200M BUDGET AND 8 YEAR DEVELOPMENT TIMELINE FOR A 63 METACRITIC GAME IS YO

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Fuck cats
entry.content: The ethnostate can only be built if we ban all cats. They massacre our birds, shit in our playgrounds, spread brain parasites to their foolish owners (retards) and, unfortunately, us. Cats are for browns and indians. White people can only flourish without them.

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Why are movies so full of propaganda against the death penalty while at the same…
entry.content: Why are movies so full of propaganda against the death penalty while at the same time constantly glorifying violence. For sex crimes, repeat offenders and murder the only way to handle them is to remove them. There is no restitution or rehabilitation they are broken on the genetic and social level and allowing them to exist in the same system as those we think could be fixed is a moral and cognition hazard to other prisoners and the guards. Accidently killing an innocent man will do less damage

entry.title: /mu/ Music: The greatness of New Wave
entry.content: Fuck Michael Jackson. Fuck Elvis. Fuck the Beatles. None made the perfect song with the best production value, riff, and themes that encapsulated a century. All of that derived from black music; New Wave was the true Faustian Occidental genre when classical was dusty; even if the bands were liberal it didn’t matter because you could hear it in their soul. https://youtu.be/A0cMu3fhw2M?is=jEz tMW08h4ZMzwfi

entry.title: /o/ Auto: Hi /o. Need some advice on what to do. I own a 2005 Ford Escape that started to …
entry.content: Hi /o. Need some advice on what to do. I own a 2005 Ford Escape that started to give me trouble. Loud banging under the pedals that would make the vehicle shake. Took it in to find out what the issue is, and was told it was the transmission. That it would cost more than the vehicle is worth to fix. But I can still drive it. Last night the banging got louder, and my left front tire flew off and went across the road. Axel got scraped up bad. Bolts all missing. What I want to know is, did the faili

entry.title: /mu/ Music: Portrait, Antichrist, and Mechanical Animals were his classic albums. Each one w…
entry.content: Portrait, Antichrist, and Mechanical Animals were his classic albums. Each one was different, which was "best" largely depends on what you are into. Holy Wood tried to blend elements of Antichrist and MA but came off as bland and forced. He tried to do something interesting with GAoG but it didn't have the same spark as his earlier work. After that he settled into being a nostalgia act. The new music since then has been acceptable enough but mostly forgettable, just another industrial/alt/metal

entry.title: /o/ Auto: This Week on Sarah-N-Tuned
entry.content: Sarah reviews the "hardcore" Toyota Tacoma TRD Pro. She's finally not wearing denim and appears to be wearing a more playful outfit than usual consisting of a white patterned mini-skirt and bra combo with a half-shirt that is semi-sheer worn over. This video has over 100k views now. https://youtu.be/DdBTSA-3Tro It looks like she got her hair done but the color is a mess and her ends are split. I wish I could help her. Ok back to the fish taco (as she refers to it): it has a PLASTIC skidplate ove

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: >save your MMO which has being dead for more than 15 years Seriously, why are th…

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Fuck man
entry.content: I want to go back in time. Everything is soulless now. We can't even have physical fucking games anymore!!!! And the saddest part is there are faggets out there that grew up in this shitty soulless environment that will defend the corporations that are willing to risk the entire hobby for a little bit of extra money. Idgaf about 99% of games but the fact that I can no longer buy collectible editions of games i do care about is infuriating me.

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: people accept the army too much. It's weird how people still fall in line and co…
entry.content: people accept the army too much. It's weird how people still fall in line and comply, rank and file to the orders and commands of the military. I just find this interesting because until the military itself changes, any attempt to liberate or free a society of people will falter and fail unless the military changes along with it. The military it still not really liberal in most parts of the world. It's just weird how people feign social progress, only to fall in line rank and file to the demands

entry.title: /v/ Video Games: Medieval 3
entry.content: >TEN (10) factions >HRE is a single faction >no Baltics >no Rus >vote which factions won't be DLC >Poland, Castille, Fatimids, Venice. Portugal and Hungary do not have a sure position for release in the base game >small factions like Bulgaria, Serbia, Croatia and Georgia have no hope of winning the vote It's over.
